Leadership: Basic: 6 lessons of Leadership Development Course
Advanced: 12 lessons of Leadership Development Course
Community Spiritedness: Basic: 1 stakeholder event, 15 hours of CS
Advanced: 2 stakeholder events, 30 hours of CS
Master: 3 stakeholder events, 30 hours of CS, master level project
Global Awareness: Advanced: 3 key stone modules, Research in-depth into 1 of 3 focuses
Master: Project with action plans to solve problems of chosen topic; Rubrics-based assessment which includes presentation
Intermediary Proficiency Award (IPA): 3 out of 13 focuses in Global Awareness
Senior Proficiency Award (SPA): 3 key stone modules in Global Awareness
Research and present findings in Global Awareness
Founder's Award: Master Level Project in Community Spiritedness
Social Entrepreneurship project in Global Awareness
Link Badge: Awarded to Boys who were members in the Juniors Programme and have completed the requirements for the award during their last session in the Juniors Programme.
1 Year Service: Awarded to Boys who have served with good conduct and have attended a minimum of 25 parades
3 Year Service: Awarded to Boys who have served with good conduct and have attended a minimum of 25 parades each year for 3 years
